rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible identifiers and feature names from the component type in type-scoped contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and scoped to their owning component.
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to visible outputs without referencing implementation-only subcomponents.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted strings and follow valid expression syntax.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
Avoid using implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
